channel.title: Digg AI Feed from X
channel.description: Top 10 AI stories from Digg's X-ranked tech feed with click-through links to original source content.

item.title: Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1 Agentic Coding Model At Low Price
item.description: Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1 Agentic Coding Model At Low Price
item.content:encoded:
Meta Releases Muse Spark 1.1 Agentic Coding Model At Low Price

Original source: https://ai.meta.com/blog/introducing-muse-spark-meta-model-api/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/la5kkotu

  • Views: 313,154
  • Likes: 3,240
  • Bookmarks: 304
  • Quotes: 281
  • Replies: 357
  • Posts: 31

Top authors

  • Alexandr Wang
  • Susan Zhang
  • Jack Rae
  • Shengjia Zhao
  • Teortaxes▶️ (DeepSeek 推特🐋铁粉 2023 – ∞)
(2) Muse Spark 1.1 is strongest at agentic performance, tool use, and computer use. It does well on long-running tasks with 1M token context window, can delegate execution to sub-agents running in parallel, and is trained to use computer interfaces on desktop, mobile, or browser.

item.title: European Parliament passes Chat Control 1.0 to let digital platforms scan private messages and photos without a warrant
item.description: The controversial measure passed during a low-attendance holiday session
item.content:encoded:
The controversial measure passed during a low-attendance holiday session

Original source: https://cadeproject.org/updates/european-parliament-rejects-extension-of-chat-control-rules-on-message-scanning/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/r2gde4np

  • Views: 507,015
  • Likes: 9,109
  • Bookmarks: 1,435
  • Quotes: 271
  • Replies: 358
  • Posts: 11

Top authors

  • @levelsio
  • Lisan al Gaib
  • Chubby♨️
@Fidias0

item.title: OpenAI model wins AtCoder algorithm contest with a perfect score of 8,300 points in six hours
item.description: The model solved all five problems, outperforming every human competitor.
item.content:encoded:
The model solved all five problems, outperforming every human competitor.

Original source: https://the-decoder.com/openais-ai-beats-every-human-at-atcoder-a-top-competitive-programming-contest/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/ktgyhu70

  • Views: 45,516
  • Likes: 598
  • Bookmarks: 70
  • Quotes: 7
  • Replies: 21
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • kache
  • Vaibhav (VB) Srivastav
OpenAI has solved all 5 problems in the algorithm contest and absolutely dominated Humans are no longer top dogs at competitive programming.

item.title: OpenAI's Will Depue proposes a paid 2x speed mode for the newly released GPT-Live voice models
item.description: The feature would run inference faster and compress audio playback.
item.content:encoded:
The feature would run inference faster and compress audio playback.

Original source: https://x.com/collision/status/2075183069137633587

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/z63zygeq

  • Views: 91,672
  • Likes: 540
  • Bookmarks: 62
  • Quotes: 8
  • Replies: 84
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Greg Brockman
  • John Collison
It’s really good — feels like the moment where the voice modality for AI apps will finally take off. Upgrade to the latest version of the ChatGPT App to get it. (Also great launch video.)

item.title: Microsoft AI launches Ode Poetry, using proprietary audio models to read poems matched to user emotions
item.description: The app recommends poems curated by Poetry Pharmacy author William Sieghart
item.content:encoded:
The app recommends poems curated by Poetry Pharmacy author William Sieghart

Original source: https://microsoft.ai/news/ode-poetry-mai/

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/geap2ml0

  • Views: 77,529
  • Likes: 202
  • Bookmarks: 79
  • Quotes: 19
  • Replies: 33
  • Posts: 4

Top authors

  • Mustafa Suleyman
  • Zephyr
BRUH

item.title: New Jersey Bill Requires Multi-Sensor Hardware for Robotaxis, Targeting Tesla
item.description: New Jersey Bill Requires Multi-Sensor Hardware for Robotaxis, Targeting Tesla
item.content:encoded:
New Jersey Bill Requires Multi-Sensor Hardware for Robotaxis, Targeting Tesla

Original source: https://x.com/niccruzpatane/status/2074988847591493639

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/sbazhvaf

  • Views: 60,977
  • Likes: 1,016
  • Bookmarks: 18
  • Quotes: 3
  • Replies: 67
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Blake Scholl 🛫
  • Jason Crawford
Which self driving car company is feeling threatened by Tesla and trying to use government to win when they couldn’t win fair and square?

item.title: AI commentators hype rumored GPT-5.6 Sol model running at 750 tokens per second on Cerebras hardware
item.description: No official benchmarks or technical documentation have been released yet.
item.content:encoded:
No official benchmarks or technical documentation have been released yet.

Original source: https://www.cerebras.ai/blog/introducing-cerebras-inference-ai-at-instant-speed

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/0qzlzdpd

  • Views: 51,261
  • Likes: 837
  • Bookmarks: 40
  • Quotes: 1
  • Replies: 50
  • Posts: 3

Top authors

  • Rohan Paul
  • Chubby♨️
I am so freaking ready to use GPT-5.6 Sol at 750 token/s Its release day friends. Get ready. Today is gonna be a great day!

item.title: Grok 4.5 debuts in fourth place on Voxelbench and the Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index
item.description: The model scored a 16-point improvement over Grok 4.3.
item.content:encoded:
The model scored a 16-point improvement over Grok 4.3.

Original source: https://artificialanalysis.ai/articles/grok-4-5-brings-spacexai-to-the-the-intelligence-frontier

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/p5pewezr

  • Views: 46,819
  • Likes: 1,102
  • Bookmarks: 70
  • Quotes: 2
  • Replies: 25
  • Posts: 2

Top authors

  • kache
  • Lisan al Gaib
@yacineMTB They were essentially a frontier tier lab without the capital and compute to compete at the frontier. It was the perfect acquisition for both sides.

item.title: OpenAI drops GPT-5.6 Sol and GPT-Live alongside a wave of model releases from ByteDance and Meta
item.description: The sudden rollout includes ByteDance's Seedream 5 Pro image generator.
item.content:encoded:
The sudden rollout includes ByteDance's Seedream 5 Pro image generator.

Original source: https://alignednews.com/ai

Digg story: https://digg.com/tech/06pzv6er

  • Views: 4,493
  • Likes: 21
  • Bookmarks: 3
  • Replies: 4
  • Posts: 5

Top authors

  • Robert Scoble
  • Justine Moore
  • Alex Volkov @ AI Engineer
  • Dan Romero
> Today we're releasing Muse Spark 1.1

item.title: OpenAI schedules a livestream amid rumors of an upcoming GPT-5.6 model release
item.description: The broadcast is set for today at 10:00 AM PST.
item.content:encoded:
The broadcast is set for today at 10:00 AM PST.

Original source: https://x.com/kimmonismus/status/2075219837677089206/photo/1

  • Quotes: 2
